name: Android SDK
description: Installs the Android SDK and command line tools.

android_home.description: The directory in which to install the Android SDK.

sdk_version.description: The version of the Android SDK to install.

build_tools_version.description: The version of the Android build tools to install.

java_version.description: The version of Java to install.

repo_os_override.description: Override the OS for the Android SDK repository. Useful for cross-platform builds
